output.code: import json, re, os, sys, textwrap, unicodedata, itertools, math, statistics
import json, re, unicodedata, os, pprint, itertools, math, statistics, collections
import json, re, unicodedata, os, sys, glob, pprint, collections, difflib, itertools

quran_path="/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path="/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"
with open(quran_path,'r',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran=json.load(f)
len(quran), list(quran[0].keys())[:5]

def normalize(s):
    # remove diacritics and tatweel and punctuation normalize hamza forms
    s2 = ''.join(ch for ch in s if ch != 'ـ')
    # remove tashkeel
    s2 = ''.join(ch for ch in s2 if not unicodedata.category(ch).startswith('M'))
    # unify hamza forms by replacing أإآ to ا ; ؤ to و ; ئ to ي
    s2 = s2.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    # remove punctuation and non-letters/digits/space
    s2 = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', s2)
    # normalize spaces
    s2 = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s2).strip()
    return s2

snippet_full = "وَإِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ رُسُلُهُمْ أَفَلَا تَتُوبُونَ لِتُجْزَوْا خَلِيلًا ۙ"
norm_snip = normalize(snippet_full)
norm_snip

# search for substring containment
matches=[]
for v in quran:
    t=v['ayah_text']
    if normalize(t).find(norm_snip)>=0 or normalize(t).find("واذ قال لهم رسلهم")==0:
        matches.append(v)
len(matches)

# search for parts "قال لهم رسلهم"
term=normalize("قال لهم رسلهم")
cands=[v for v in quran if term in normalize(v['ayah_text'])]
len(cands)

# search for "قالت رسلهم"
term=normalize("قالت رسلهم")
cands=[v for v in quran if term in normalize(v['ayah_text'])]
len(cands), [ (c['surah_name'], c['ayah_id'], c['ayah_text']) for c in cands[:5] ]

# search for "وإذ قال لهم"
term=normalize("وَإِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ")
cands=[v for v in quran if term in normalize(v['ayah_text'])]
len(cands)

# search for "افلا تتوبون"
term=normalize("أَفَلَا تَتُوبُونَ")
cands=[v for v in quran if term in normalize(v['ayah_text'])]
len(cands)

# search for "لتجزوا"
term=normalize("لِتُجْزَوْا")
cands=[v for v in quran if term in normalize(v['ayah_text'])]
len(cands)

term=normalize("خليلًا")
cands=[v for v in quran if term in normalize(v['ayah_text'])]
len(cands), [(c['surah_name'], c['ayah_id'], c['ayah_text']) for c in cands]

# search for verses containing رسلهم
cands=[v for v in quran if "رُسُلُهُمْ" in v['ayah_text'] or "رسلهم" in v['ayah_text']]
[(c['surah_name'], c['ayah_id'], c['ayah_text']) for c in cands]
